arts.ttl: Milan Secure Santiago Gimenez: Striker Arrives Today, Medical Tomorrow
arts.sum: AC Milan have successfully concluded negotiations for Santiago Gimenez, the highly sought-after Feyenoord striker. The Argentine-born Mexican international is set to arrive in Italy today at approximately 18:15, with medical examinations scheduled for Sunday.
